fullHistory.content:
Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — ready to help you build something innovative. Here's what we can do:

🤖 Custom Robot Design
"Design a gripper that picks up blocks"
"Create a walking pattern for a four-legged robot"
"Add a light sensor that changes behavior"

⚙️ Physics & Simulation
"Simulate sliding on varied surfaces"
"Observe forces during robot collisions"
"Adjust mass to explore bounce effects"

🛠️ Build & Experiment
"Swap materials and test durability"
"Run quick scene swaps to compare"
"Tweak settings for new gestures"
